title: gymnadenia × legrandiana var. souppensis
intro: Gymnadenia × legrandiana var. souppensis is a rare and hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Gymnadenia conopsea and Gymnadenia densiflora. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gymnadenia × legrandiana var. souppensis include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant, making it useful in treating coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rarity.
